variants.title: Mann Filter U 620/4 y KIT Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 544-SET
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter U 620/4 y KIT Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 544-SET
variants.description: The compact MANN-FILTER urea filters are characterized by high filter fineness, proven suitability for everyday use and a long service life. They protect system components against wear and failure and are resistant to frost and ammonia. MANN-FILTER urea filters are available for leading SCR systems in trucks and buses.
specifications: Style: Urea Filter, Dimension A: 67.0 mm, Dimension C: 33.0 mm, Dimension D: 70.0 mm, Dimension H: 76.0 mm

variants.title: HiFi Filter SD 70313 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 544-SET
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SD 70313 Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 544-SET
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SD 70313 Urea Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 544-SET. Easy to install and replace, the SD 70313 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: UREA FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 69.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 67.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 33.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 76.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 67.0 mm
